evals.name: verify-single-email
evals.prompt: Verify the email john@acme.com using Reacher. Show me the exact API call with all required headers and proxy config.

expectations.text: Uses POST to https://reacher.nextwave.io/v1/check_email
Includes CF-Access-Client-Id and CF-Access-Client-Secret headers
Includes proxy config with host r1.proxy4smtp.com and port 1081
Proxy includes username and password fields
Body uses to_email field for the target email
Mentions the 4 verdict values: safe, risky, invalid, unknown

evals.name: classify-verification-results
evals.prompt: I verified 5 emails. Results: (1) safe + not disposable + not role, (2) safe + is_role_account, (3) safe + is_catch_all, (4) risky + catch_all, (5) invalid. Which do I add to my campaign?

expectations.text: Email 1 (safe, clean): ADD to campaign
Email 2 (safe + role): EXCLUDE - role accounts (info@, admin@) are risky
Email 3 (safe + catch_all): RISKY - validate with No2Bounce first
Email 4 (risky + catch_all): validate with No2Bounce, include only if Deliverable
Email 5 (invalid): NEVER send
Mentions the downgrade logic: safe gets downgraded to risky for disposable/role/catch-all

evals.name: catch-all-validation-no2bounce
evals.prompt: Reacher says email john@catchall-domain.com is risky with is_catch_all: true. How do I validate if it's a real mailbox?

expectations.text: Uses No2Bounce API for catch-all validation
Step 1: POST to https://connect.no2bounce.com/v2/n2b_validate_email
Includes apitoken header for No2Bounce auth
Step 2: Poll GET with trackingId for results
Deliverable scoreStatus means safe to send
UnDeliverable/AcceptAll means do NOT send

evals.name: pre-campaign-verification-workflow
evals.prompt: I have 500 leads for a cold email campaign. What's the verification workflow before I can start sending?

expectations.text: Verify ALL leads before sending (not a sample)
Only add safe (non-disposable, non-role) to campaigns
Catch-all leads must be validated with No2Bounce
Never send to invalid or unknown
Target bounce rate < 3%
Stop sending if bounce rate > 5%
Re-verify lists older than 30 days
Rate limit: 60 req/min with 1s delay between checks
